name: Young & Co.'s Brewery, P.L.C.
summary: Young & Co.'s Brewery, P.L.C. operates and manages pubs and hotels in the United Kingdom. The company operates in two segments, Managed Houses and Ram Pub Company. It sells drinks and food, as well as provides accommodation services; and owns, leases, and sub leases its owned or leased pubs to third parties. As of April 3, 2020, the company had 205 managed pubs and 68 tenanted pubs primarily located in London and the South East. Young & Co.'s Brewery, P.L.C. was founded in 1831 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
